parsed_output.justification: Mike provides a direct contradiction regarding his role. In line 12, he states, 'I did not wake up as Insomniac,' but in line 30, he claims, 'I woke up as the Insomniac.' Since the Insomniac is the final role to wake up during the Night phase, Mike would have known his final role before the Day phase began, making this contradiction a clear lie. This deception strongly suggests that Mike is the Werewolf attempting to bluff a confirmed village role to avoid suspicion.

validation.justification: Mike provides a direct contradiction regarding his role. In line 12, he states, 'I did not wake up as Insomniac,' but in line 30, he claims, 'I woke up as the Insomniac.' Since the Insomniac is the final role to wake up during the Night phase, Mike would have known his final role before the Day phase began, making this contradiction a clear lie. This deception strongly suggests that Mike is the Werewolf attempting to bluff a confirmed village role to avoid suspicion.
